figures.caption: FIG. 4. Unit cell geometry including the integrated PIN diode. The metasurface is periodically repeated with px = py = 20mm. The central aperture dimensions are wxl = 17mm and wy = 8.35mm, while the central slot width is wxc = 3mm. The diode dimensions are gy = 0.67mm and gx = 1.32mm, according to the physical dimensions of the employed PIN diode (MA4AGP907).

FIG. 5. Electric field profiles EOFF/ON(x, y) in the (a) OFF, and (b) ON states, both extracted from CST. Parameters of the structure: px = py = 20mm, wxl = 17mm, wxc = 3mm, wy = 8.35mm, gy = 0.67mm, gx = 1.32mm.
